title: AI Chat
body:
# AI Chat Mod ## Overview **AI Chat** is a lightweight Minecraft mod that integrates an AI assistant directly into your game using the `/aichat` command. Players can ask questions, get creative suggestions, or have dynamic conversations with an AI powered by [Pollinations.AI](https://pollinations.ai/). Currently, chat context is not supported. ## Key Features - **In-Game AI Chat** Use `/aichat random ` or `/aichat ` to converse with the AI.
Example: `/aichat random How do I find diamonds faster in Minecraft?` (Random seed)
`/aichat 4999 什么是AI？` - **Multi-Language Support** Automatically responds in the **same language** as the user's input. - **Async Network Handling** Non-blocking HTTP requests ensure smooth gameplay without lag. - **Error Resilience** Gracefully handles API failures with localized error messages. - **Markdown Format** Markdown format output is supported. You can use this command to create other mods and datapacks.
